revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
Adding [[Category:making categorization show up on newly imported categories and templates]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:tab went inactive so I need to add another category]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] to [[Category:new pages]][[Category:new pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Text replacement - "tab went inactive so I need to add another category" to "qq"
Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Inventors by century]]
Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Medieval inventors]]
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 2 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
revision.text:
==Old Content== ==Old Content== ==Old Content== {{Navseasoncats}} {{Category see also|8th-century scientists}} {{CatAutoTOC}} [[:en:Category|Category]] [[:en:Category|Category]] {{draft categories|
[[Category:8th-century people by occupation|Inventors]] }} [[en:8th-century inventors]] [[sn:8th-century inventors]]
[[en:Category:8th-century inventors]] [[en:Category:8th-century inventors]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q106687985)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵}}" to ""
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Navseasoncats}}
{{Category see also|8th-century scientists}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{wikidata link|Q106687985}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:8th-century inventors]]
[[en:Category:8th-century inventors]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:sn_crud|TEST8th-century inventors]]
[[Category:8th-century people by occupation|Inventors]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=8th-century_inventors here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
